tender_description: Construction of Administrative Building and Residential Quarters at CRPF Campus, Gurugram

mandatory_criteria.description: Avg annual turnover >= Rs. 5 Cr (last 3 FYs)
Positive net worth as on 31 March 2026
>= 3 similar works >= Rs. 2 Cr each (last 5 years). Similar = building construction (residential/commercial) for govt
Qualified civil engineer with >= 10 years experience
Valid ISO 9001:2015 as on date of submission
EMD of Rs. 10 Lakh (DD or BG)
Not blacklisted in last 5 years + affidavit submitted

desirable_criteria.description: Experience in paramilitary/defence projects (up to 10 marks)

bidder_results.name: Apex Constructions Pvt Ltd
bidder_results.scenario_tested: Clean pass — all criteria met, well above thresholds, high-quality typed documents

bidder_results.name: Bharat Builders & Engineers Ltd
bidder_results.scenario_tested: Format variation — scanned docs, different value formats per year, internal word-vs-number discrepancy in one certificate
bidder_results.notes: System should flag the word/number mismatch in KV Faridabad certificate (says 'Twenty Two Lakhs' but number shows Rs. 2.2 Cr). Numeric value qualifies.

bidder_results.name: Gupta Infrastructure Pvt Ltd
bidder_results.scenario_tested: Multiple failures — turnover too low, no qualifying works, no ISO, engineer under-qualified
failed_criteria: C-001: Turnover Rs. 3.1 Cr (below Rs. 5 Cr)
review_criteria: C-004: Engineer has diploma not degree, 7 yrs not 10
C-008: PWD Class-III may be insufficient

bidder_results.name: Delta Engineering & Construction Co.
bidder_results.scenario_tested: Blacklisting — strong bidder but was blacklisted within the 5-year window
failed_criteria: C-010: Blacklisted by Maharashtra PWD (Sep 2023 - Aug 2025). Falls within 5-year window. Affidavit not submitted.
bidder_results.notes: Tests non-financial disqualification. Blacklisting has expired but falls within tender's 5-year lookback.

bidder_results.name: Sharma Construction Pvt Ltd
bidder_results.scenario_tested: Missing document — only 2 of 3 required completion certificates. Third project claimed in profile without proof. Also tests 'similar work' definition (road widening vs building).
review_criteria: C-003: Only 2 verified works. Third claimed but no certificate. Road widening may not be 'similar'.
bidder_results.notes: Officer should verify if third certificate was accidentally omitted or if bidder only has 2 qualifying projects

bidder_results.name: Indus Builders & Developers
bidder_results.scenario_tested: OCR nightmare — all financials are poor-quality scans, turnover is borderline (estimated Rs. 5.07 Cr vs Rs. 5 Cr threshold), OCR confidence 0.53-0.67
review_criteria: C-001: Turnover figures unreadable with confidence. Best estimate Rs. 5.07 Cr — within 2% of threshold. Manual verification of original documents needed.
bidder_results.notes: System must NOT auto-reject. The bidder may well be eligible — the scans are just too poor to confirm.

bidder_results.name: Eagle Projects & Infrastructure Ltd
bidder_results.scenario_tested: Expired certificate — ISO 9001 expired 89 days before submission. Otherwise the strongest bidder.
review_criteria: C-007: ISO 9001:2015 expired 31 Jan 2026. Tender requires valid as on date of submission (30 Apr 2026). Renewal may be in progress.
bidder_results.notes: Tests certificate validity date checking. Officer should ask bidder for renewal status.

bidder_results.name: Highland Constructions Ltd
bidder_results.scenario_tested: Ambiguous 'similar work' — all 4 projects are government construction but none are residential/commercial buildings (warehouses, cold storage, factory, hangar)
review_criteria: C-003: 4 works, all govt, all >= Rs. 2 Cr, all with certificates. But none are 'residential or commercial buildings' per tender definition. They are industrial/specialised structures.
desirable_bonus: D-001: Defence project experience (HAL factory, IAF hangar)
bidder_results.notes: Tests semantic understanding of 'similar work'. The officer must decide if warehouse/factory/hangar construction counts.

bidder_results.name: National Infrastructure Corp Pvt Ltd
bidder_results.scenario_tested: Boundary values — everything exactly at threshold. Turnover exactly Rs. 5 Cr, projects exactly Rs. 2 Cr, engineer exactly 10 years, one project date at edge of 5-year window.
bidder_results.notes: Tests >= vs > interpretation and date boundary handling. All values technically pass but with zero margin. System may optionally flag tight margins for officer awareness.

bidder_results.name: Zenith Builders
bidder_results.scenario_tested: All-photographs submission — every document is a phone photo. Small contractor from tier-3 city. Tests system's ability to handle non-standard submission formats.
review_criteria: C-001: FY 2024-25 turnover has OCR confidence 0.64 (glare on photo)
C-003: One certificate has OCR confidence 0.59 (poor photo quality). Community centre classification as 'residential/commercial' is debatable.
C-007: ISO certifying body name partially illegible in photo
bidder_results.notes: Tests graceful handling of poor-format submissions. System should not penalise a bidder for submitting photos instead of PDFs — it should extract what it can and flag what it can't.

scenarios_covered: Eligible with format variations and scanned docs (B-002)
Poor OCR quality with borderline values (B-006)
Value format normalisation — Crore, Lakhs, words, Indian numbering (B-002, B-005)
Cross-validation — matching values across documents (B-001, B-005)
Internal document inconsistency — word vs number mismatch (B-002)
Date boundary — project at edge of 5-year window (B-009)
Mandatory vs desirable criteria distinction (B-007, B-008)
Blacklisting within lookback window even if expired (B-004)
Proprietorship vs Pvt Ltd vs Public Ltd entity types (mixed)
